text:
Market today: The mood is mixed for tech, with Meta showing strength on AI chip news, but broader concerns about AI payoff slowing down and risking recession. This creates a push-pull for your chip-heavy book.

Your holdings: SOXL is down 24.38% and SPAL is down 20.66%. Both are leveraged ETFs, meaning they decay and drops are amplified, especially on margin. Review their stops closely.

Watch: Keep an eye on broad tech sentiment around AI's economic impact. Also, ensure your stops on SOXL and SPAL are appropriate given their volatility and your margin exposure.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions aggressively and stay disciplined on stops in this volatile tech environment.
plays: SOXL: Your -24.38% loss is significant. Re-evaluate your stop at 200, as leveraged ETFs demand tight risk management.
SPAL: Down 20.66% and leveraged. Its default stop at 21.38 needs a hard look; adjust to protect capital.
No new buys today - hold and watch. The scanner shows some setups, but no compelling catalyst for new margin exposure.
